project_plan.name: contract inventory
project_plan.gate: Q4_K/Q6_K candidate funcs, .kd descriptors, metadata, and source launch rules identified

project_plan.name: single-kernel HCQ loader smoke
project_plan.gate: load a selected descriptor by name from the llama gfx1100 object; do not launch until kernarg is proven
project_plan.kill: object cannot be loaded by AMDProgram/HCQ without HIP runtime or unsupported relocations

project_plan.name: kernarg and launch capture
project_plan.gate: capture one llama Q4_K and one Q6_K launch's 144-byte kernarg plus grid/local through HIP-only tracing
project_plan.kill: hidden runtime state or non-buffer args cannot be represented in tinygrad HCQ

project_plan.name: standalone correctness
project_plan.gate: HCQ launch writes correct Q4_K/Q6_K outputs against tinygrad/llama oracle on one role shape
project_plan.kill: descriptor/kernarg is runnable but not correct after VA substitution

project_plan.name: standalone performance
project_plan.gate: selected llama MMVQ kernel reaches >=90% of llama standalone or >=60% HBM on role shape
project_plan.kill: imported kernel lands near tinygrad in-model speed before integration

project_plan.name: one-role in-model route
project_plan.gate: one high-share role improves >=10% isolated in-model with graph-safe fallback
project_plan.kill: standalone win disappears for reasons not fixable by routing

project_plan.name: role matrix and activation lifecycle
project_plan.gate: Q4_K roles, Q6_K roles, and activation reuse policy are mapped; projected W==D >=5%
project_plan.kill: role coverage cannot reach >=5% decode projected movement

project_plan.name: final W==D/dNLL verdict
project_plan.gate: ctx sweep clears >=5% sustained decode speedup; exact path byte-identical or q8 path dNLL-gated
project_plan.kill: no sustained end-to-end movement under clock-controlled W==D

project_plan.name: native transfer decision
project_plan.gate: decide artifact/source dependency vs tinygrad renderer/scheduler feature ownership

decision: funded large path should start with source/object import P1 before native renderer work
